# Grain Size Distribution

**Summary**: The distribution of different sizes of particles within a sediment sample.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] analyzed grain size distributions to distinguish between fluvial and aeolian processes.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Used to identify the physical energy and transport mechanism of the sedimentary system.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Determined through sieve analysis or similar methods.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Aeolian systems show a distinct trend where medium, fine, and very fine sand dominate in the parabolic dunes. ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 99]])
